---
title : "The Political Participation of Latin American School-Age Students"
date : "2025-03-01"
author : "Miranda, Daniel; Castillo, Juan Carlos; Carrasco, Kevin & Herrera-Leighton, Anais"
categories : ["Book Section"]
publication : " The {{Political Psychology}} of {{Social Unrest}} in {{Latin America}} 104--122 . London: Routledge [https://doi.org/10.4324/9781003282174-6](https://doi.org/10.4324/9781003282174-6). ISBN: 978-1-003-28217-4"
publication_short : " The {{Political Psychology}} of {{Social Unrest}} in {{Latin America}} 104--122 . London: Routledge [https://doi.org/10.4324/9781003282174-6](https://doi.org/10.4324/9781003282174-6). ISBN: 978-1-003-28217-4"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Miranda, Daniel; Castillo, Juan Carlos; Carrasco, Kevin & Herrera-Leighton, Anais (2025). *The Political Participation of Latin American School-Age Students*.  The {{Political Psychology}} of {{Social Unrest}} in {{Latin America}} 104--122 . London: Routledge [https://doi.org/10.4324/9781003282174-6](https://doi.org/10.4324/9781003282174-6). ISBN: 978-1-003-28217-4

:::
